<!-- Thanks for contributing to Potret! -->

**What this does**
A short description of the change.

**Why**
The problem it solves / the issue it closes (e.g. `Closes #123`).

**Checklist**
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (tsc + vite)
- [ ] `cargo build --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml` passes
- [ ] I tested the change on macOS
- [ ] For UI changes: I checked it in light interaction (capture → popup → edit, if relevant)
